name: spacescan
description: Measure any space with an iPhone camera in the browser — one photo, reference-plane homography + single-view metrology, zero dependencies.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && npx --yes esbuild js/app.js --bundle --minify --format=esm --outfile=dist/js/app.js && npx --yes esbuild css/style.css --minify --outfile=dist/css/style.css && cp index.html target.html LICENSE dist/
